author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Analysis: matmul_f16_f32 already works with cublasGemmEx and Tensor Cores. Three gaps remain:
1. BMM f16 — attention layers use bmm heavily, autocast policy is tracked but no kernel dispatches. HIGHEST PRIORITY.
2. BF16 matmul — infrastructure exists but no gpu_matmul_bf16. Ampere+ GPUs only.
3. Conv2d f16 — trivial once matmul_f16 works (conv uses matmul internally).

Plan: (A) Add gpu_bmm_f16_f32 using cublasGemmStridedBatchedEx, wire into bmm autocast path. (B) Add bf16 matmul and f32→bf16 conversion kernel. (C) Wire conv2d to use f16 matmul under autocast.
